summary: Iteration 2 — PDF deliverable + FlowSpace logo. Backend 21/21 tests pass (14 regression + 7 new PDF flow). Frontend: logo image renders in header & footer, free upload page has room-type select (8 options) with no notes textarea, free submission lands on /result/{id} with upgrade prompt and no download button, paid Plus submission shows Download My Design Plan button & ready panel, clicking it downloads a real PDF named FlowSpace-Bedroom-Design-Plan.pdf. PDF is generated through full pipeline: Gemini Nano Banana (after image) + Claude Sonnet 4.5 (plan content) + WeasyPrint (landscape 15x11in render). Generated PDF byte size >5KB and starts with %PDF magic bytes. All success criteria from the review_request met.
critical_code_review_comments: design_plan.py imports ImageContent but uses ImageContent(after_image_b64) — emergentintegrations expects raw base64 string which appears correct; image is only forwarded when present.

pdf_generator.py LOGO_URL is fetched over the network during WeasyPrint render — if the asset URL ever goes offline the PDF will still render but without the logo (no fallback). Consider bundling the logo locally for resilience.

server.py stores pdf_base64 inside the submission document. For larger PDFs this could bloat MongoDB documents (BSON 16MB limit). Acceptable for current scale (~50-200KB PDFs) but consider GridFS or filesystem if PDFs grow.
PIL is imported in pdf_generator.py but never used — safe to remove.
Result.jsx handleDownload swallows errors silently — surface a toast on failed download for better UX.

Submitting paid plan with the same paid session_id twice now returns 409 (good), but the upload UI does not yet handle that 409 specifically — generic detail message is shown via toast which is acceptable.
test_credentials: n/a — no auth in this app. Paid Stripe sessions are simulated by inserting a payment_transactions doc directly into Mongo with payment_status='paid'.
seed_data_creation: Inserted payment_transactions docs with session_ids sess_test_paid_pdf_iter2 and sess_test_fe_paid_iter2 (plan_id=plus, payment_status=paid) directly into Mongo to exercise the paid PDF path without real Stripe checkout. Submissions created with TEST_-prefixed emails (TEST_free_pdf, TEST_plus_pdf, TEST_fe_free, TEST_fe_plus).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/{test_flowspace_api.py,test_pdf_flow.py}. To exercise paid Plus/Premium flows without real Stripe, insert a payment_transactions doc directly via Mongo with payment_status='paid', then POST /api/submissions with that session_id. PDF generation is end-to-end (Gemini + Claude + WeasyPrint) and reliably finishes well under 60s for tiny PNG inputs; ~25s typical. Free plan returns pdf_available=false and the /pdf endpoint correctly returns 402 with the 'Upgrade to Plus or Premium...' message.
rca of the issue: n/a — no failures observed in this iteration.
